title: Nawegaon National Park
tagline: Nawegaon National Park — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Navegaon National Park is a National park located in the Arjuni Morgaon subdivision of Gondia district in state of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Navegaon National Park is a National park located in the Arjuni Morgaon subdivision of Gondia district in state of Maharashtra, India. The Dr Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary, Navegaon is home to almost 60% of the bird species found in entire Maharashtra. Every winter, flocks of migratory birds visit the lake. The national park has diverse type of vegetation ranging from dry mixed forest to moist forest.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nawegaon National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nawegaon National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nawegaon National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (118 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nawegaon National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nawegaon National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nawegaon National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Nawegaon National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nawegaon National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nawegaonbandh Dam.
